designs.title: What is AppySentinel
designs.description: Orientation — headless rule, three zones, three lifecycle moments, two pilots.

designs.title: Architecture Overview
designs.description: Foundation primitives (7 baked + 4 planned) → Collect/Access/Deliver zones → CQRS-lite sub-layers → Operational layer.

designs.title: Pattern Capability Matrix
designs.description: Pattern × app grid with status indicators (baked / planned-core / template / recipe / future / out-of-scope). 46 tests, CI, Husky shown in header.

designs.title: Recipe Catalog
designs.description: One card per recipe — name, zone, status, what it solves, which pilot uses it. launchd/systemd shown as template artifacts.

designs.title: Developer Workflow
designs.description: Three lifecycle moments (Scaffold/Build/Deploy), commands, Husky pre-push hook, GitHub Actions CI + publish pipeline, published package versions.

designs.title: What AppySentinel Does
designs.description: What it is, what problem it solves, the three zones in plain language, and a case study.

designs.title: Capabilities & Fit
designs.description: Three zones from a buyer perspective — available/planned capability cards and a good-fit/not-fit guide.
